page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Manage your account, security, and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Basic information about your account
profile.emailHelp: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if you need to.
profile.timezoneHelp: We use this zone to send alerts in your local time.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to modify this profile
errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your password and access methods

errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Configure how and when you want to receive alerts
notifications.emailEnabledHelp: Disabling this silences ALL email alerts (even if individual alerts are active)
notifications.defaultEmailHelp: By default we use your account email. You can set another if you prefer to receive alerts at a different address.
notifications.quietHoursHelp: We won't send emails during this time window. They'll be queued and sent together when the window ends.
notifications.frequencyHelp: When you create a new alert, it will use this frequency by default. You can change it per alert.

frequency.instantDesc: Immediate email when there's a match
frequency.dailyDesc: Daily digest at 8:00 AM in your timezone
frequency.weeklyDesc: Weekly digest every Monday at 8:00 AM

notifications.alertsListEmpty: You don't have any alerts yet. <createLink>Create your first one</createLink>.

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Your organization data and members
organization.comingSoonBody: Inviting users, managing roles and permissions is coming in the next sprint.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Customize your experience
preferences.languageHelp: The interface will be shown in this language. It doesn't affect tender content (always in Spanish).
preferences.themeHelp: Light, dark, or following your system preference.
